title: eleusine brevifolia
intro: Eleusine brevifolia, also known as short lemongrass, is a type of grass-like plant that belongs to the Poaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which have been shown to aid in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of Eleusine brevifolia include its ability to reduce fever, relieve digestive issues, and alleviate respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular natural remedy in traditional medicine.
